victim_name.question: Could I have your full name for the complaint records?
victim_name.hint: Example: Rahul Sharma or Priya Nair
victim_name.label: Complainant Name

victim_phone.question: What is your contact phone number?
victim_phone.label: Contact Phone

victim_email.question: What is your email address? We'll send your complaint acknowledgement and tracking link there.
victim_email.label: Email Address

incident_date.question: On which date did this incident occur?
incident_date.hint: Example: 20-04-2025 or yesterday or last Tuesday
incident_date.label: Incident Date

incident_time.question: Approximately what time did the incident happen? (Morning/Afternoon/Evening, or exact time if known)
incident_time.hint: Example: 2:30 PM or around 10 in the morning or evening
incident_time.label: Incident Time

incident_location.question: What is your city and state? This helps us route your complaint to the nearest cybercrime cell.
incident_location.hint: Example: Bengaluru, Karnataka or Chennai, Tamil Nadu
incident_location.label: City / State

amount_lost.question: How much money was lost or transferred without your consent?
amount_lost.label: Amount Lost (₹)

upi_transaction_id.question: What is the UPI transaction ID or reference number shown in your bank/app?
upi_transaction_id.label: UPI Transaction ID

suspect_upi_id.question: What is the suspect's UPI ID that received the money?
suspect_upi_id.label: Suspect UPI ID

platform.question: Which UPI app or platform was used for the transaction? (e.g., Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, Bank App)
platform.hint: Example: GPay or PhonePe or Paytm or SBI YONO
platform.label: UPI App Used

screenshot.question: Do you have a screenshot of the transaction or conversation? (You can upload it after submitting)
screenshot.label: Screenshot Available

utr_number.question: Do you have the UTR (Unique Transaction Reference) number from your bank statement?
utr_number.label: UTR Number

bank_name_victim.question: Which bank account or wallet was the money debited from?
bank_name_victim.hint: Example: SBI Savings Account or HDFC Current Account
bank_name_victim.label: Your Bank / Wallet

account_number_victim.question: What is your bank account number from which money was deducted? (last 4 digits is fine too)
account_number_victim.hint: Example: XXXX1234 or full account number
account_number_victim.label: Your Account Number

caller_number.question: What was the phone number the fraudster called from?
caller_number.label: Caller's Phone Number

caller_claimed_to_be.question: Who did the caller claim to be? (e.g., SBI bank officer, RBI official, police, KYC agent)
caller_claimed_to_be.hint: Example: SBI bank officer or RBI employee or police inspector
caller_claimed_to_be.label: Caller Claimed To Be

otp_shared.question: Did you share any OTP, PIN, or password with the caller?
otp_shared.label: OTP / PIN Shared

call_recording.question: Do you have a recording of the call? (You can upload it after submitting)
call_recording.label: Call Recording Available

bank_name.question: Which bank or financial institution did the caller claim to represent?
bank_name.hint: Example: SBI or HDFC or ICICI or RBI
bank_name.label: Bank Claimed

remote_app_installed.question: Did the caller ask you to install any remote-access app like AnyDesk, TeamViewer, or QuickSupport?
remote_app_installed.label: Remote App Installed

phishing_url.question: What was the URL or website address you were directed to?
phishing_url.label: Phishing URL

data_compromised.question: What personal or financial data did you enter on that website? (e.g., card number, internet banking password, OTP, Aadhaar)
data_compromised.hint: Example: credit card number and CVV or internet banking username and password
data_compromised.label: Data Compromised

email_screenshot.question: Do you have a screenshot of the phishing email or message?
email_screenshot.label: Email/Message Screenshot

bank_involved.question: Which bank or account was targeted?
bank_involved.label: Bank Targeted

account_compromised.question: Was your bank account or any online account actually accessed or drained after you entered your details?
account_compromised.label: Account Accessed/Drained

amount_invested.question: What is the total amount of money you put into this investment or trading platform?
amount_invested.label: Amount Invested (₹)

platform_name.question: What is the name of the investment platform or app they asked you to use?
platform_name.hint: Example: CryptoProfit365 or a Telegram group or WhatsApp group
platform_name.label: Investment Platform

recruiter_contact.question: How did the recruiter or person who brought you into this scheme contact you? What was their phone/ID?
recruiter_contact.label: Recruiter Contact

payment_mode.question: How did you transfer the investment money? (UPI / bank transfer / crypto wallet / cash)
payment_mode.hint: Example: UPI to a bank account or USDT crypto transfer or NEFT
payment_mode.label: Payment Mode

payment_proof.question: Do you have payment receipts, screenshots, or transaction IDs as proof?
payment_proof.label: Payment Proof Available

withdrawal_blocked.question: When you tried to withdraw your profits, did the platform block you, ask for more fees, or go silent?
withdrawal_blocked.label: Withdrawal Blocked

platform_used.question: On which platform or app did you first make contact with this person? (WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, dating app, etc.)
platform_used.hint: Example: WhatsApp or Instagram DM or Telegram
platform_used.label: Platform Used by Suspect

suspect_contact.question: What is the suspect's phone number, UPI ID, or social media username?
suspect_contact.label: Suspect Contact / ID

amount_paid.question: Have you already paid them any amount? If yes, how much?
amount_paid.hint: Example: 5000 or 0 if you haven't paid
amount_paid.label: Amount Already Paid (₹)

blackmail_method.question: How are they threatening you? (e.g., threatening to send video to contacts, post on social media, etc.)
blackmail_method.hint: Example: threatening to send the video to my WhatsApp contacts
blackmail_method.label: Blackmail Method

screenshot_available.question: Do you have screenshots of the conversations or threats? (You can upload them later)
screenshot_available.label: Screenshots Available

amount_demanded.question: How much money are they demanding from you?
amount_demanded.label: Amount Demanded (₹)

content_recorded.question: Do you know if any recording or screenshot of you was actually captured?
content_recorded.label: Content Was Recorded

job_platform.question: Where did you find this job or task offer? (WhatsApp, Telegram, a website, or someone contacted you directly?)
job_platform.hint: Example: Telegram group or a website called fasttask.in or WhatsApp message
job_platform.label: Job/Task Platform

task_description.question: What kind of tasks were you asked to do? (e.g., like YouTube videos, rate apps, complete surveys)
task_description.hint: Example: like YouTube videos and screenshots or rate hotel apps
task_description.label: Tasks Assigned

deposit_paid.question: Were you asked to pay a deposit or 'activation fee' to start the tasks? If yes, how much did you pay?
deposit_paid.hint: Example: 2000 or 500 or 0 if you didn't pay
deposit_paid.label: Deposit / Fee Paid (₹)

recruiter_contact_job.question: What is the contact of the person who offered you this job? (phone number, WhatsApp, Telegram ID)
recruiter_contact_job.label: Recruiter / HR Contact

job_offer_screenshot.question: Do you have screenshots of the job offer or task assignments?
job_offer_screenshot.label: Job Offer Screenshot

app_used_for_tasks.question: Was there a specific app you had to install for these tasks?
app_used_for_tasks.hint: Example: TaskEarn Pro or CoinTask or no specific app
app_used_for_tasks.label: Task App Used

website_url.question: Do you have the website URL they directed you to?
website_url.label: Scam Website URL

sim_stopped_working.question: Did your mobile SIM suddenly stop working or show 'No Service' before you noticed the fraud?
sim_stopped_working.label: SIM Stopped Working

service_hijacked.question: Which service was accessed without your permission? (Bank account, UPI, email, social media)
service_hijacked.hint: Example: SBI bank account via UPI or Gmail account
service_hijacked.label: Service Hijacked

amount_lost_sim.question: How much money was drained from your account during the SIM swap?
amount_lost_sim.label: Amount Lost (SIM Swap)

bank_name_sim.question: Which bank account was drained?
bank_name_sim.hint: Example: SBI or HDFC Bank savings account
bank_name_sim.label: Bank Account Drained

transaction_sms.question: Do you have the transaction SMS or confirmation messages sent to your number?
transaction_sms.label: Transaction SMS Available

telecom_operator.question: Which telecom operator is your SIM from? (Airtel, Jio, BSNL, Vi, etc.)
telecom_operator.hint: Example: Jio or Airtel or BSNL
telecom_operator.label: Telecom Operator

social_platform.question: Which social media or dating platform did you meet this person on?
social_platform.hint: Example: Facebook or Instagram or Shaadi.com or Hinge
social_platform.label: Social Platform

fake_profile_id.question: What was the fake profile's name, username, or ID?
fake_profile_id.hint: Example: @john.smith.usa or the name they used
fake_profile_id.label: Fake Profile ID / Name

romance_money_sent.question: How much total money did you send to this person?
romance_money_sent.label: Money Sent to Suspect (₹)

how_long_known.question: How long had you been in contact with this person before sending money?
how_long_known.label: Duration of Contact

profile_screenshot.question: Do you have screenshots of their profile?
profile_screenshot.label: Profile Screenshot

chat_screenshot.question: Do you have screenshots of your conversations with this person?
chat_screenshot.label: Chat Screenshot

amount_total_sent.question: Was this the total amount or were there multiple transfers? If multiple, what is the grand total?
amount_total_sent.label: Total Amount Sent (₹)

lottery_prize_claimed.question: What prize or lottery were you told you had won?
lottery_prize_claimed.hint: Example: 25 lakh KBC prize or a car or iPhone
lottery_prize_claimed.label: Prize Claimed

processing_fee_paid.question: How much money did you pay as 'processing fee', 'taxes', or 'GST' to claim the prize?
processing_fee_paid.hint: Example: 5000 or 15000 or 0 if you haven't paid yet
processing_fee_paid.label: Processing Fee Paid (₹)

contact_channel.question: How were you contacted about this lottery win? (SMS, WhatsApp, Email, Phone call)
contact_channel.hint: Example: SMS or WhatsApp message or phone call
contact_channel.label: Contact Channel

sender_contact.question: What is the phone number or email ID of the person who contacted you about the lottery?
sender_contact.label: Sender Contact

lottery_message_screenshot.question: Do you have a screenshot of the lottery message or notification?
lottery_message_screenshot.label: Lottery Message Screenshot

bank_used_for_payment.question: Which bank or wallet did you use to pay the processing fee?
bank_used_for_payment.hint: Example: SBI account or PhonePe or Google Pay
bank_used_for_payment.label: Bank Used for Fee Payment

shopping_website.question: What is the name or URL of the website where you placed the order?
shopping_website.hint: Example: www.dealsmart.in or a seller on OLX
shopping_website.label: Shopping Website / Platform

order_id.question: Do you have an order ID or reference number from the purchase?
order_id.hint: Example: ORD123456789 or no order ID was given
order_id.label: Order ID

product_not_received.question: What was the product you ordered that was not delivered or was fake?
product_not_received.hint: Example: iPhone 15 Pro or leather jacket or never delivered
product_not_received.label: Product Ordered

amount_paid_shopping.question: How much did you pay for this order?
amount_paid_shopping.label: Amount Paid (₹)

order_screenshot.question: Do you have a screenshot of the order confirmation or payment receipt?
order_screenshot.label: Order Screenshot

seller_contact.question: Do you have the seller's phone number, email, or any contact information?
seller_contact.label: Seller Contact

delivery_status.question: What was the last status of your delivery? Did it ever show shipped?
delivery_status.hint: Example: showed delivered but never received, or never updated after payment
delivery_status.label: Delivery Status

identity_misused.question: What type of identity misuse occurred? (loan taken in your name, account opened, SIM taken, etc.)
identity_misused.hint: Example: personal loan of 5 lakhs taken in my name or credit card opened
identity_misused.label: Type of Identity Misuse

how_discovered.question: How did you discover that your identity was misused? (credit report, loan recovery call, bank notice, etc.)
how_discovered.hint: Example: got a loan recovery call or saw my CIBIL score drop
how_discovered.label: How Discovered

loan_amount.question: What is the amount of loan or credit that was fraudulently taken in your name?
loan_amount.label: Fraudulent Loan Amount (₹)

financial_institution.question: Which bank or NBFC issued this fraudulent loan or credit?
financial_institution.hint: Example: HDFC Bank or Bajaj Finance or PaySense
financial_institution.label: Financial Institution

aadhaar_misused.question: Was your Aadhaar card used in this fraud?
aadhaar_misused.label: Aadhaar Misused

pan_misused.question: Was your PAN card used in this fraud?
pan_misused.label: PAN Misused

credit_score_affected.question: Has your credit score (CIBIL) been affected by this fraud?
credit_score_affected.label: Credit Score Affected
